errors.description: Signed bundle timestamp attachment or referenced signed bundle is missing or malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp verification until signed bundle timestamp evidence is present

errors.description: Timestamp attachment hash, signed bundle hash, or message imprint hash does not match.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp verification until all timestamp hashes are canonical

errors.description: Timestamp token metadata is malformed or token hash cannot be verified.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp verification until token evidence is canonical

errors.description: Timestamp authority policy identifier is missing, malformed, or unexpected.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp verification until TSA policy is trusted

errors.description: Timestamp attachment identifier was already observed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp verification until replay risk is resolved

errors.description: Timestamp attachment scope, timestamp, or retention metadata is missing or malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp verification until scope and chronology are deterministic

errors.description: Timestamp attachment diagnostics contain sensitive or unredacted material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp verification until diagnostics are redacted
